description: Using customer purchase data, an agent must perform a simple RFM (Recency, Frequency, Monetary) segmentation.

nodes.task_description: For each customer in the dataset, calculate their Recency, Frequency, and Monetary value.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates the three RFM metrics for each customer.

nodes.task_description: Assign each customer to a segment (e.g., 'High-Value', 'At-Risk', 'New') based on their RFM scores.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly applies the segmentation logic.

nodes.task_description: Generate a summary showing the number of customers in each segment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces an accurate count for each customer segment.
